net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar

Class Node

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.astar.Node
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Comparable<Node>

    public class Node
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Comparable<Node>
    This class represents a node object which has several properties important for the path finding algorithm.
    Since:
    0.5
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    marc.engelmann
